mainDressCode.title: Attire Guide
mainDressCode.description: WE WOULD LOVE TO SEE YOU IN YOUR FORMAL ATTIRE THAT SUITS IN OUR COLOR MOTIF

sections.title: Principal Sponsors
sections.description: Black suit with navy blue tie for Ninongs, while navy blue long formal gown for Ninangs.

sections.title: Guests
sections.description: For men, wear formal or casual suit with necktie or bow tie. For the ladies, wear formal or casual gown.
